acceptance.assertion: Current alert/advisory state is checked live and recorded before changing dependencies.
High severity dependency alerts are remediated or explicitly risk-accepted with rationale.
Relevant SemantAH tests/checks pass after changes, or exact blockers are recorded.
The task states that Dependabot alert cleanup does not prove full security correctness or runtime safety.

goal: Use live GitHub/Dependabot security evidence for heimgewebe/semantAH, then remediate or explicitly document the existing default-branch dependency alerts reported during RPU-V1-T013.

metadata.observed_warning: GitHub push for SemantAH PR #254 reported 10 default-branch vulnerabilities: 3 high, 3 moderate, 4 low.
metadata.outcome: SemantAH PR #255 remediated all ten historical default-branch Dependabot alerts. PR #256 restored the current Ruff formatting gate without changing behavior or dependency versions. Post-merge GitHub readback reports zero open alerts.
validation: SemantAH PR #255 merged as 2c627d1ff820212e274f4faaef9d78c31d40b37a; GitHub CodeQL and repository checks passed.
SemantAH PR #256 merged as c306e89105605778a382aa12c231f727c221cc74; all reported GitHub checks succeeded and merge state was CLEAN.
Exact PR #256 head 3115cba3002584d2ed463bf3840cbc363aba10ac: make CARGO=/home/alex/.cargo/bin/cargo lint test test-rust lint-rust passed.
Python validation: 108 tests passed and 1 integration test was intentionally deselected by the standard non-integration target.
Rust validation: complete workspace test suite passed; Clippy passed with -D warnings.
uv lock --check and git diff --check passed.
Post-merge GitHub Dependabot REST readback on 2026-07-13: vulnerability alerts enabled, 0 open alerts, 10 historical alerts state=fixed.

verified_acceptance.semantah-security-alert-live-state: GitHub vulnerability alerts are enabled. The Dependabot API was checked live before closeout and again after PR #256 merged; it reports zero open alerts and ten historical alerts in fixed state.
verified_acceptance.semantah-security-highs-addressed: All three high-severity alerts, together with three medium and four low alerts, are state=fixed after SemantAH PR #255.
verified_acceptance.semantah-security-non-claims: The task and durable SemantAH proof explicitly state that alert cleanup does not establish full security correctness, runtime safety, exploit unreachability, or absence of non-Dependabot vulnerabilities.
verified_acceptance.semantah-security-tests: Current exact-head validation passed after the formatting-only closeout: Ruff, 108 Python tests, Rust workspace tests, Clippy -D warnings, uv lock --check, and git diff --check.

title: Triage semantAH dependency security alerts
